title: Samsung Galaxy Z8: What's Trending
description: Samsung Galaxy Z8 is a trending topic with discussions around One UI 9 updates and features.

sources.title: Here’s what Samsung said about One UI 9 rollout for old devices
One UI 9: When will Galaxy S26, S25, S24 and S23 series get Android 17
One UI 9 debuts with agentic AI capabilities, stronger security and new productivity tools

sections.heading: Samsung's One UI 9 Rollout
paragraphs: Samsung's One UI 9 is a significant update that has been a point of discussion, especially in relation to older devices.
According to Sammy Fans, Samsung has commented on the rollout of One UI 9 for older devices.

sections.heading: One UI 9 Features
paragraphs: News18 reports that One UI 9 comes with new AI capabilities, enhanced security, and improved productivity tools.

sections.heading: Android 17 Update
paragraphs: Digit discusses the timeline for Galaxy S26, S25, S24, and S23 series to receive Android 17, which is part of the One UI 9 update.

faq.a: One UI 9 is an update by Samsung that includes new AI capabilities, stronger security, and new productivity tools, as reported by News18.
Galaxy S26, S25, S24, and S23 series are expected to receive Android 17, as mentioned by Digit.
